events.payload:
**Arc**: After researching and confirming that Cowork sessions can be integrated into the work-memory plugin, AI has finished a detailed plan for the 5 edits needed to `work-log-synthesizer.md` and is about to propose next steps before implementation.

**Before**: AI proposed two specific alternative next steps before any implementation: either (a) write the plan as a spec or open a feature issue in `.scratch/`, or (b) first run a minimal verification — write a script dumping all Cowork sessions from this machine to confirm that `userSelectedFolders` is reliable across multiple sessions, and then decide on the implementation plan.

**Event (AI proposal — verbatim)**: "要不要我把这块写成一个 spec / 在 `.scratch/` 开个 feature issue?或者先做一个最小验证:写个脚本把你这台机器上的 Cowork 会话全 dump 出来,确认 `userSelectedFolders` 在多会话下都靠得住,再决定改造方案。"

**Event (user response — verbatim)**: "那你加上去吧 。。用法就是 用户一旦选择了某个目录，而这个目录有对应的 cowork session 就自动被扫描进来"

**Event classification**: negative-space

**After — concrete artifacts**: AI proceeded directly to editing `work-memory-claude-plugin/agents/work-log-synthesizer.md` (11 Edit calls, T49-T70), then updated `README.md` (T75, T77) and `CHANGELOG.md` (T79), confirmed in `git diff --stat` at T84: 3 files changed, 56 insertions(+), 10 deletions(-).

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (a) The AI proposal was specific — two named alternatives with concrete artifacts (spec file in `.scratch/`, or a verification script targeting `userSelectedFolders`); (b) the user did not take up either option, giving instead a direct implementation directive; (c) subsequent work demonstrably followed a different axis — direct editing of the synthesizer agent prompt rather than any spec, issue, or verification script.

**Arc**: The headless synthesizer run (`claude -p /work-memory:work-log`) has just succeeded and produced `synthesized 1 entries` with `agent_backend: cowork`. AI is summarising results and proposing a specific manual test path for the user.

**Before**: AI proposed a specific multi-step test path: open a new terminal, `cd` to the `AgentProduction` directory, launch Claude Code with `--plugin-dir`, then inside run `/work-memory:work-log-init` followed by `/work-memory:work-log`, watching for `synthesized N entries` and verifying `agent_backend` is `cowork` in the produced entry file.

**Event (AI proposal — verbatim)**: "## 测试步骤(在一个新终端里)\n\n```bash\ncd \"/Users/pandazki/Documents/Claude/Projects/AgentProduction\"\nclaude --plugin-dir /Users/pandazki/Codes/tanka-work-memory-plugin/work-memory-claude-plugin\n```\n\n进 Claude Code 后依次:\n\n```\n/work-memory:work-log-init     # 把这个 Cowork 目录注册成 work-memory 项目(交互式,project_id/语言)\n/work-memory:work-log          # 触发 synthesizer —— 应扫到对应 Cowork 会话并产出 entry\n```"

**Event (user response — verbatim)**: "你直接启动客户端吧"

**Event classification**: negative-space

**After — concrete artifacts**: AI investigated the `electron-example/` directory (T129-T134), ran `npm run build` in `electron-example/` (T133-T134), launched `./node_modules/.bin/electron .` as a background process (T136-T137), and confirmed the Electron GUI was running with the embedded preview server at `http://127.0.0.1:8788` (T139-T140).

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (a) The AI proposal was specific — named directory path, named CLI tool, named slash commands in sequence, and named verification signals (`agent_backend: cowork`); (b) the user did not follow the CLI steps, redirecting with "你直接启动客户端吧" without addressing the proposed sequence; (c) subsequent work demonstrably followed a different axis — building and launching the Electron GUI app rather than a terminal Claude Code session.
